novel_features.name: Unified cross-clinic agenda
novel_features.description: See every appointment across every Jane clinic you use in one chronological view.
novel_features.rationale: Jane forces a separate login per clinic subdomain; only a local tool holding all clinics can merge them.
novel_features.why_it_matters: One call answers 'what do I have coming up anywhere' instead of logging into each clinic portal separately.

novel_features.name: Next-opening finder
novel_features.description: Find the soonest available slot for a practitioner + treatment, paging past Jane's 7-day availability cap.
novel_features.rationale: Jane's openings API refuses windows longer than 7 days; the CLI stitches consecutive windows until it finds a slot.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Answers 'when is the earliest I can get in' without clicking week-by-week through the portal.

novel_features.name: Availability watch
novel_features.description: Poll availability and alert when an earlier slot than a target opens up.
novel_features.rationale: Requires repeated windowed polling and diffing against a target date that no single Jane API call provides.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Catches cancellations that free up an earlier appointment.

novel_features.name: Cross-clinic conflict check
novel_features.description: Before booking, warn if a candidate slot collides with an existing appointment at another clinic.
novel_features.rationale: Requires a unified local view of appointments across every clinic, which only the multi-clinic store holds.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Prevents double-booking yourself across different clinics.

narrative.headline: Book, view, and manage your Jane (janeapp.com) appointments across every clinic from one terminal — with a unified agenda, next-opening finder, and availability watch the patient portal can't do.
narrative.value_prop: Jane is the booking platform behind thousands of physio, massage, chiro, and wellness clinics, but each clinic is a separate subdomain with its own login and no public API. This CLI holds a profile per clinic, logs in with your patient username and password, and unifies booking, viewing, and managing appointments across all of them. `agenda` merges every booking into one view; `next-opening` pages past Jane's 7-day availability cap to find the soonest slot.
narrative.auth_narrative: Each Jane clinic is its own subdomain with a separate patient account. Register a clinic (`clinic add <name> --url https://<clinic>.janeapp.com`), then `auth login --clinic <name>` performs Jane's two-step username/password sign-in and stores the session for that clinic. Repeat per clinic; read commands accept --all-clinics.

quickstart.comment: Register a clinic; each keeps its own subdomain and session.
Two-step Jane sign-in; prompts for the password, stores the session.
View your upcoming appointments at that clinic.
List practitioners so you have IDs for availability and booking.
Find the soonest bookable slot, paging past the 7-day window.
Every appointment across every logged-in clinic in one view.

troubleshoots.symptom: auth login fails or appointments return 401
troubleshoots.fix: Your session expired — run 'janeapp-pp-cli auth login --clinic <name>' again.

troubleshoots.symptom: openings returns 'Number of days must be an integer between 1 and 7'
troubleshoots.fix: Use num-days 1..7; for longer horizons use next-opening/watch which page automatically.

troubleshoots.symptom: book says a treatment can't be booked online
troubleshoots.fix: Check 'treatments' — only entries with book_online=true are online-bookable; others are call-to-book.

narrative.when_to_use: Use this CLI when you are a patient at one or more Jane clinics and want to book, check, or reschedule appointments without logging into each clinic's web portal separately. It shines when you juggle multiple providers on Jane and want a single agenda and availability search across all of them.

recipes.title: Unified agenda across clinics
recipes.explanation: Every upcoming appointment from every logged-in clinic, narrowed to the fields an agent needs.

recipes.title: Earliest slot with a specific PT
recipes.explanation: Stitches 7-day windows until it finds the first available opening.

recipes.title: Watch for an earlier slot
recipes.explanation: Polls availability and reports when something opens up before your target date.

recipes.title: Dry-run a booking
recipes.explanation: Shows exactly what would be booked without writing anything to Jane (dry-run by default; add --confirm to submit).
